text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing that some of Matikanefukukitaru's
choreography is inspired by one of her dreams, I
go to take a look...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You've finally come, Trainer! I shall now
perform my lucky dance, so keep your eyes on me
at all times!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: First off, I slowly crawl across the floor...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And then I gradually raise my right leg up toward
the sky! Hi-yaap!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think of my wondrous dance
moves?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I bet you feel luckier already!
choice_data_list:
Was that some kind of nouveau contemporary
dance?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmph! No, it was not!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But whatever, it's fine if you don't understand! I'm
sure you felt our luck increase, though, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I know how you feel. I was at a loss for words once I finished the choreography. I was that emotional!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I'd like to perform this in a concert as
soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I admire her guts, but I'm not sure the lively stage
of a winning concert is the right place to
showcase this particular dance...
choice_data_list: Sure, it can't hurt to try!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah, I sure hope it wouldn't hurt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little shocked! But strangely enough, I feel a
little excited about this now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep the moves just as they were
communicated to me so as not to extinguish my
heart's blazing flame!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll put on the most dazzling performance of the
whole concert!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I need to go review my dream for some extra
practice! Night night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a quick nap, she incorporates even more
"wondrous" dance moves into the choreography.
Her finished product is quite dynamic.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm! Energetic, you say?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh... I guess I should avoid unnecessary
movements. If I cut that part out and change
some things around...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh? Oh ho! Let's give this a shot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Boom shakalaka! ♪ Wassup y'all! It's your girl,
Matikanefukukitaru! I want this bonfire lit, so
lemme hear you clap!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Believers, put your hands to the sky!
Non-believers, listen up and let me open your
third eye! Whoop whoop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her hip-hop-inspired dance isn't quite what I
expected, but it certainly is more energetic.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can't wait to show this to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A very enthusiastic practice session is all it takes
to liven up her dance skills.
